caption: A person wearing a black t-shirt and a yellow lanyard is seated in a room with various objects in the background, including a shelf with collectibles and a red-lit device. The video displays a screen recording of a website titled "True Random Number Service" from "RANDOM.ORG." The page features a "List Randomizer" tool with a text box containing a list of items, including "(1) GREG McGill Hall of Fame Icons Autograph #d 1-of-1" and "(11) RANDY JOHNSON 2001 1/1 AUTO." A red "Subscribe" button for a YouTube channel is overlaid on the bottom right. As the scene progresses, the person remains seated, and the text within the list randomizer box updates to show a different order of items, such as "(11) RANDY JOHNSON 2001 1/1 AUTO" appearing at the top. The overall layout of the webpage and the person's position remain constant.
